jd_text:
A private, globally invested business group is appointing a Creative Director based in Singapore. With operations in healthcare, engineering, and investment management, the group has consistently placed design, brand, and visual clarity at the heart of its differentiation and global growth. This appointment carries full accountability for the Group’s design standards and visual systems globally - strengthening creative ambition while safeguarding its visual legacy.
This is a senior role within a stable and well-capitalised international environment, offering meaningful creative latitude across industries and geographies. The culture values precision, discipline, and strength of craft to build brands that convey authority and a narrative.

ResponsibilitiesReporting to senior leadership, you will serve as the Group’s chief visual architect, partnering with operating companies to elevate and govern global design standards. You will lead the central design function while ensuring brand coherence across markets, balancing consistency with each business’s distinct identity.
This role blends strategic oversight with hands-on authority. You will set creative direction and uphold quality across print, digital, and product environments - personally critiquing layouts, refining typography, directing visual content, and guiding UI/UX decisions to ensure clarity, credibility, and enduring brand integrity.

RequirementsYou are an experienced hands-on design leader with at least 10 years of professional practice, including time within top-tier design or creative agencies and ideally also success operating in structured in-house environments. You possess a deep command of layout, typography, proportion, and visual systems, alongside a strong understanding of digital product design and UI/UX principles.
Your judgement is disciplined, your eye exacting, and your standards uncompromising.You are comfortable engaging senior stakeholders while safeguarding design integrity, and you are equally at ease setting vision and executing detail. You remain close to the craft, not solely managing, and adopt AI-enabled tools to elevate workflow and output quality.

To ApplyFor immediate consideration, please click Apply to submit your resume in Word format. We regret that only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.Registration No: R1550844EA Licence No: 21S0587
